lines: Yes' aduh' amahoro by’ukuri, Ahor'ayaduhesh' amaraso ye.
Nta mirimo se yayatwambura ? Yes' ahor'aruhur' abamwumvira.
Twayagira, tutaz' ibizaba ? Tuzi Yesu kw ari W' utwara byose !
Nta byago byadukur' imitima; Nta bwoba bagjr' abamwihishemo.
Inshuti nubwo tutari kumwe, Nkukw aturind' arazirinda ha zo.
Mu rupfu azaduh' amahoro ye : Rwaneshejwe n'Umutabazi wacu
Ibyago byo mw isi bizashira, Umwam' atwinjize mu mahoro ye.
